Security Best Practices

  • ✓ Never expose keys in client-side code - Always use environment variables or secrets management
  • ✓ Use test keys for development - Keep production keys separate and secure
  • ✓ Rotate keys regularly - Generate new keys every 90 days or after team changes
  • ✓ Monitor API usage - Watch for unusual patterns that might indicate compromised keys
  • ✓ Revoke immediately if compromised - Generate a new key right away if you suspect a breach

Your New API Key

Important: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!
